channel.title: GNartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Real Successor To Sydney Sweeney's R-Rated $401 Million Thriller Isn't Its Sequel
3 Reasons Why Avengers: Endgame Is An Important Re-Watch Before Doomsday
Evil Dead Burn's New Trailer Quietly Answered A Major Movie Mystery
Kat Graham Says Her 'Michael' Scenes Were Among Those Cut for Legal Reasons
item.description: The Michael Jackson biopic opens tomorrow ... but one cast member told fans this morning, don't expect to see her in the film. Kat Graham was cast as ...

item.title: Alex Cooper, Husband Reportedly Skip Team Meeting After Behavior Complaints
item.description: Things might be a bit unwell in Alex Cooper's world ... she and her husband, Matt Kaplan, reportedly skipped an all-hands meeting at their company Unw...

item.title: Influencer Landon McBroom’s Ex Says His GF Lied in Restraining Order Filing
item.description: Shyla Walker says Landon McBroom’s girlfriend spun a wildly exaggerated version of their custody showdown ... and she claims to have the receipts to p...

item.title: Jada Pinkett Smith Asks Judge to Force Will's Ex-Pal to Cough Up $49K in Court
item.description: Jada Pinkett Smith is asking a court to order Will Smith's former friend to pay the $49K tab from her attorneys ... TMZ has learned. According to cour...

item.title: Bobbi Althoff Joins 'Secret Lives of Mormon Wives' Orange County Spinoff
item.description: Bobbi Althoff's cringe comedy has propelled her into reality TV ... because she's landed a role on the upcoming 'Secret Lives of Mormon Wives' spinoff...
